final:
module top_module (
    input obf_clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

    always @(posedge obf_clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
